# API Reference ‚Äî INDEX

*Pre-curated for branch `docs/api-reference-v1`. Auto-regenerated by
`scripts/generate_api_docs.py` on next run with full backend deps
installed. See `docs/api/README.md` for regeneration instructions.*

Total backend routers: ~24 (per `app/main.py:_register_routers`).

---

## Per-tag reference files

| Tag | File | Endpoints | Purpose |
|---|---|---:|---|
| `strategies` (CRUD) | [STRATEGIES.md](STRATEGIES.md) | 6 | User-built strategy CRUD |
| `strategy-templates` | [TEMPLATES.md](TEMPLATES.md) | 4 | Template catalog + clone |
| `strategy-engine` (backtest) | [BACKTEST.md](BACKTEST.md) | 3+ | Synchronous + dormant async backtest endpoints |
| `brokers` | [BROKERS.md](BROKERS.md) | 4+ | Fyers / Dhan integration |
| `chart` | [CHART.md](CHART.md) | 3 | Chart history + WS |
| `webhook` | [WEBHOOKS.md](WEBHOOKS.md) | 2 | TradingView signal ingest |
| `auth` | (auto-gen on regen) | TBD | Login + JWT refresh + signup |
| `users` | (auto-gen on regen) | TBD | User profile CRUD |
| `kill-switch` | (auto-gen on regen) | TBD | Per-user safety switch |
| `admin` | (auto-gen on regen) | TBD | Admin operations |
| `indicators` | (auto-gen on regen) | 1 | Indicator catalog |
| `compliance` | (auto-gen on regen) | TBD | Compliance reports |
| `chart-markers` | (auto-gen on regen) | TBD | Trade markers overlay |

Other routers not pre-curated (less customer-facing or admin-internal):
- `algomitra` (in-app AI advisor)
- `role-demo` (admin role testing)
- `system` (health + status)
- `compliance`
- `strategy-positions`, `strategy-signals`, `strategy-tester`
- `strategy-versions`, `strategy-compare-fix`
- `pine-import`
- `admin-indicators`
- `trade-markers`

The auto-generation script will produce a complete `<TAG>.md` per
router once it can import the FastAPI app with the full dep tree.

---

## Quick navigation

### Customer-facing (most common)
- `POST /api/strategies` ‚Äî create a strategy
- `GET /api/strategies/{id}` ‚Äî fetch a strategy (with `template_origin`)
- `POST /api/templates/{slug}/clone` ‚Äî clone a template into a strategy
- `POST /api/strategies/{id}/backtest` ‚Äî run a backtest (sync; Phase D)
- `GET /api/strategies/indicators` ‚Äî indicator catalog (returns array, NOT envelope ‚Äî see Queue III IndicatorPanel fix)
- `GET /api/chart/history` ‚Äî historical candles
- `POST /api/webhook/strategy/{token}` ‚Äî TradingView signal ingest

### Backtest extension (dormant ‚Äî Days 1-5)
- `POST /api/backtest` ‚Äî enqueue async backtest (Day 1-3 + Day 4 + Day 5 rate-limited; router not yet registered in main.py)
- `GET /api/backtest/{run_id}` ‚Äî fetch run + metrics
- `GET /api/backtest/{run_id}/trades` ‚Äî paginated trades

### Auth + admin
- `POST /api/auth/login` ‚Äî email/password ‚Üí JWT
- `POST /api/auth/refresh` ‚Äî refresh JWT
- `GET /api/users/me` ‚Äî current user profile
